name: Automate.io

seo.title: Automate.io — Developer Portals / API Management

when_to_use: No-code trigger-action flows connecting cloud apps
Sync leads from form to CRM without engineering
Automate Slack notifications from project management events
Multi-step workflows bridging SaaS tools post-acquisition
Connect 200+ apps without writing integration code

review.verdict: Automate.io is gone—Notion bought and killed it, so pick Make, Zapier, or n8n for new workflows.
review.best_for: Historical reference only; the product no longer operates
review.not_for: Any new automation project—this product has been discontinued
